title: dolichlasium lagascae
intro: Dolichlasium lagascae, also known as Lagascea decemloba, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Dolichlasium lagascae include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its antimicrobial properties, which can aid in wound healing and prevent infections. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its essential oil can also be extracted for use in aromatherapy and other applications.
